## Summary
AI Backend Engineer and AI SDE specializing in backend systems, distributed architectures, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) applications, and agentic AI workflows. I am also exploring Forward Deployed Engineer roles that combine backend depth, customer context, and end-to-end ownership.

## About

### Past
Started with a straight line into backend. B.Tech in IT from Uka Tarsadia University (2022–2026) and a ~9-month internship at Logicwind where I shipped real backend services across monolithic and microservice architectures — REST APIs, third-party integrations, performance optimisation, reliability work. Node.js and TypeScript became muscle memory, not just classroom concepts.

### Present
Building the AI backend layer. A full RAG pipeline with Gemini embeddings and pgvector (live on this portfolio), a WhatsApp automation system in production for a local business, and an AI ticket-triage pipeline running on Kafka and BullMQ with full OpenTelemetry observability. The common thread: not experimenting with AI — building the backend infrastructure that makes AI features ship, scale, and stay honest.

### Future
Headed toward Forward Deployed Engineering — roles that put backend depth directly in front of customers, where the problem isn't fully defined when you walk in and ownership is end-to-end. Targeting Applied AI Engineer, Forward Deployed AI Engineer, and Solutions Engineer roles at companies where AI is the product, not a feature.

- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Agentic AI & AI Agents
- Multi-Agent Orchestration

- Google Gemini API
- Embeddings
- pgvector (vector similarity search)
- Vercel AI SDK
- Prompt Engineering
- Context grounding / hallucination control

## Backend Engineering
- Microservices architecture
- Event-driven systems
- Authentication (JWT, OAuth, RBAC)
- Rate limiting & security hardening
- Background job processing
- WebSockets / real-time systems
- API design (REST & GraphQL)

## Projects

### AI Portfolio RAG Chatbot
- Production RAG system powering portfolio assistant
- Uses Gemini embeddings + pgvector semantic search
- Designed to reduce hallucinations via grounded retrieval
- Live at: https://samir-portfolio-dev.vercel.app

### AI Ticket Triage System
- Microservices-based architecture
- Kafka + BullMQ event processing
- Observability with OpenTelemetry + Prometheus + Grafana

### WhatsApp Campaign Platform
- Node.js + automation system for business messaging workflows
- Built for real-world SME use case

### Eventifyy Platform
- Full-stack event management system
- GraphQL API with PostgreSQL + React frontend

## Career Goals
Seeking opportunities as:
- AI Backend Engineer
- AI SDE (Software Development Engineer)
- Agentic AI Engineer
- Forward Deployed Engineer
- Backend Engineer
- Full-Stack Engineer

I am especially interested in roles that require customer-facing problem solving, comfort with ambiguity, and ownership from discovery to deployment.

Open to remote and India-based roles.
